{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/67149165?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/rafabd1/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/rafabd1/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/rafabd1/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/rafabd1/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/rafabd1", "id": 67149165, "login": "rafabd1", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjY3MTQ5MTY1", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/rafabd1/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/rafabd1/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/rafabd1/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/rafabd1/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/rafabd1/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/rafabd1", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-64648", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 6.0, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:P/VC:H/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-524", "name": "Use of Cache Containing Sensitive Information"}], "description": "## Impact

A server-side `fetch` with a request body may return a cached **response** body from a different request to the same URL but different body. Confidential data in the `POST`'s **response** body would then leak to unauthorized requests. Though the request itself will not be deduped.

This only applies to `fetch` calls with a request that has a different init than the one passed to `fetch`.
Safe: `fetch(new Request(init), init)`
Unsafe: `fetch(new Request(init), aDifferentInit)`

## Workarounds

No workaround exists besides upgrading. Applications using Pages Router are not vulnerable.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-68g3-v927-f742", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-22T23:08:17Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-68g3-v927-f742", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-68g3-v927-f742"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-64648"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-22T23:08:17Z", "references": ["https://github.com/vercel/next.js/security/advisories/GHSA-68g3-v927-f742", "https://github.com/vercel/next.js/commit/062f66700b52a5d6bba2c0605d55577ab7ad262c", "https://github.com/vercel/next.js/commit/73b94872bc343d09494b50394d8c08eb9fc8e56a", "https://github.com/vercel/next.js/releases/tag/v15.5.21", "https://github.com/vercel/next.js/releases/tag/v16.2.11", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-68g3-v927-f742"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/vercel/next.js/security-advisories/GHSA-68g3-v927-f742", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/vercel/next.js", "summary": "Next.js: Cache confusion of response bodies for requests with bodies", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-22T23:08:20Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-68g3-v927-f742", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "15.5.21", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "next"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 13.0.0, < 15.5.21"}, {"first_patched_version": "16.2.11", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "next"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 16.0.0, < 16.2.11"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Next.js: Cache confusion of response bodies for requests with bodies
